fields.name: LAB TECHNICIAN
fields.description: Processes analyzes and manages laboratory samples to support oceanographic research and data quality

fields.name: RESEARCH SCIENTIST
fields.description: Leads the scientific objectives of the mission

fields.name: CTD TECHNICIAN
fields.description: Deploys operates and maintains CTD systems to collect water‑column data

fields.name: MOORING TECHNICIAN
fields.description: Deploys recovers and services oceanographic moorings and instruments

fields.name: WILDLIFE OBSERVER
fields.description: Monitors and records marine mammal and seabird activity during operations

fields.name: STUDENT
fields.description: Assists with data collection processing and basic analysis under supervision

fields.name: CHIEF SCIENTIST
fields.description: Overall responsibility for scientific program ensuring objectives methods and data quality

fields.name: PRINCIPAL INVESTIGATOR
fields.description: Leads scientific design execution and accountability of research mission

fields.name: PROJECT LEAD
fields.description: Oversees projects timelines deliverables and scientific quality

fields.name: PHYSICAL OCEANOGRAPHER
fields.description: Analyzes ocean physical properties such as temperature salinity  circulation and mixing

fields.name: BIOLOGICAL OCEANOGRAPHER
fields.description: Studies marine organisms and ecosystem responses to ocean conditions

fields.name: CHEMICAL OCEANOGRAPHER
fields.description: Examines ocean chemistry including nutrients gases and biogeochemical cycles

fields.name: DATA SCIENTIST
fields.description: Analyzes and models complex data using statistics programming and machine learning to generate actionable insights that support decision‑making

fields.name: PHYSICAL SCIENTIST
fields.description: Conducts research and analysis of physical systems (e.g. ocean atmosphere geophysics) to understand processes interpret data and support scientific and operational decision‑making
